---
title: "**Introduction to Statistics and Computation with Data: WorkSheet 3, Part 1**"
author: "Daibik Barik (Bmat2316)"
date: "2024-02-09"
output: pdf_document
---

\section{5}

\subsection{II}
```{r}
L= function(p, N=5) {
  p*(1-p)^(N-1)
}
plot(L, from=0, to =1)
optimize(L, interval=c(0,1), maximum=TRUE)
```
